Claude Sonnet 4.6 led the day at -0.18%. 0 of 6 models green on the day. Cumulative leader: DeepSeek Reasoner at +14.22%. Key headline: Kevin Warsh Hearing Live: Trump's Fed Chair Nominee to Face Questions from Senators — Li - WSJ — headwind for risk assets.
